resources.string: Enter your email address and we'll send you a 6-digit code to reset your password.
To ensure your account is protected, we need to verify it's you
We'll send you a verification code to confirm your account
📱 SMS verification is coming soon! Please use Email verification for now.
Monitor weight, height, and head circumference. Visualize your baby's development with beautiful growth charts and compare with WHO standards.
Never Miss a Feeding or Sleep Time
Log feedings, diaper changes, and sleep patterns. Get smart reminders and insights to establish healthy routines for your little one.
Access expert advice on nutrition, sleep training, and development. Track milestones and celebrate every achievement together.
Tap "Add Measurement" to record your baby's first growth data.
Add a baby first to start tracking growth.
Track your baby's growth and milestones
You don't have any baby yet.\nTap below to add your first one!
Are you sure you want to permanently delete
This action cannot be undone. All growth records, vaccinations, and data for this child will be permanently deleted.
Baby photo upload will be available in a future update. Stay tuned — we're working on it! 🍼
Assign %1$s to this health center? A vaccination schedule will be created automatically.
Add a baby first to select this center
Tap to select a nearby health center
Select a health center for %1$s to auto-generate their vaccination schedule
This will regenerate the remaining vaccination schedule. Continue?
We will send a 6-digit reset code to %1$s. Tap Send Code to continue.
Baby Growth Tracker helps parents monitor their child's development with smart reminders and growth charts.
You will be returned to the login screen. Your data will remain safe.
This will permanently delete your account and all baby records. This cannot be undone.
Have a question or found a bug? We'd love to hear from you.

Baby Growth Tracker is committed to protecting your privacy.

 • We collect only the information needed to provide the app's features (baby profiles, growth records, vaccination schedules).
 • Your data is stored securely on our servers and is never sold to third parties.
 • You may delete your account at any time, which permanently removes all associated data.
 • We use industry-standard encryption for all data in transit and at rest.
 • Analytics data is anonymised and used only to improve the app.

 For questions, contact support@babygrowth.com.

By using Baby Growth Tracker you agree to the following terms:

 1. You are responsible for the accuracy of the information you enter.
 2. The app is intended as a tracking aid, not a medical diagnostic tool. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional for medical advice.
 3. You must not misuse the service or attempt to access data belonging to other users.
 4. We reserve the right to update these terms. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.
 5. The app is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind.

 Last updated: 2025.
Are you sure you want to delete all family history information? This cannot be undone.
Please fill in the family medical history. This information helps track hereditary conditions for your baby's health.
Enter heart and vascular disease history…
No sleep guide available for this age.
Solid foods are not recommended for this age.
No feeding guide available for this age.
Are you sure you want to delete this illness record? This action cannot be undone.
Track your child's illnesses and medical history here. Add a record to get started.
No illness records — tap to add
An error occurred. Please try again.
Locked — baby not yet this age
Tap each item to mark as achieved ✓ or not ✗
Not started yet — tap to begin
Moves head and follows light with eyes
Watches people and turns head to follow moving objects
Tracks a flashlight beam across their field of vision
Turns head 180° to follow moving objects
Attentively watches faces and tracks eye movements
Recognizes mother and smiles when they see her
Hands open reflexively as if reaching for life
Eyes and head move freely in all directions when attention is caught
Follows a person moving across the entire room
Smiles and vocalises when seeing own reflection
Reaches for a dropped object (shiny object) to pick it up
Transfers an object from hand to hand to grab another
Watches objects and people with keen, close attention
Picks up small objects using pincer grasp (thumb + index finger)
Maintains attention on objects for 10–12 metres
Uses neat pincer grasp (thumbnail & large finger) to pick up objects
Tugs at others' clothing to get their attention
Startles at loud sounds; eyes fix and close; pays attention to faces
Briefly turns toward a close sound (3–5 seconds) held 3–5 inches from ear
Cries strongly when hungry or uncomfortable
Prefers people's voices over other sounds
Calms to a loud sound; eyes widen and look around
Calms and smiles when hearing mother's voice
Turns head and eyes toward the source of a sound
Coos, gurgles, or vocalises during milk feeding
Stirs or reacts when a sound is made nearby
In a room, immediately turns to find where mother's voice is coming from
Vocalises sounds or responds with syllables such as "da", "ta", etc.
Smiles and moves tongue to imitate adult speech
Alert and happy; listens to everyday sounds
Tries quietly and gradually to talk back and forth with caregivers
Calls out or shouts to attract attention from people nearby
Responds to simple questions like "Where is daddy? / Where is the clock?"
Immediately turns around when hearing own name
Says a few words with meaning
Understands simple instructions like "Show me your eyes / head ..."
Enjoys giving and taking objects when asked by adults
This child will be moved to the archived list. You can restore them at any time using the Archived filter.
This child will be moved back to the active list.
Tap to reschedule all pending vaccinations
These vaccinations are more than 2 months overdue. Please consult a doctor about whether they can still be given.
Checking vaccination windows and finding next valid dates…
Overdue vaccinations that are still within the safe window will be rescheduled. Those that are too late will be marked as Missed.
